# params

```go
import "github.com/agentstation/starmap/internal/server/params"
```

Package params provides HTTP request parameter parsing for API handlers.

```go
func ParseModelFilter(r *http.Request) query.ModelFilter
```

ParseModelFilter extracts model filter parameters from an HTTP request.

<a name="ParseModelFilterStrict"></a>
## func [ParseModelFilterStrict](<https://github.com/agentstation/starmap/blob/main/internal/server/params/model_filter.go#L110>)

```go
func ParseModelFilterStrict(r *http.Request) (query.ModelFilter, error)
```

ParseModelFilterStrict parses and validates every supplied query parameter. Unlike the compatibility parser, malformed client input is never silently replaced by a default or ignored.
